creator: dag-erli@ifi.uio.no
text:
chashaml@worldnet.att.net writes:
> When attempting to install FreeBSD 2.2.7 over a local network from a
> local FTP server, the install dialog does not permit selection of 
> anything but the listed FTP servers.  Although the dialog box says you
> can select "other" there is no way to do this that I can find, and 
> "other" is not on the list.

Select "URL" (second item from the top) and type in the URL of the
FreeBSD directory (e.g. ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/).

DES
-- 
Dag-Erling Smørgrav - dag-erli@ifi.uio.no
